features: plain-language BUY and SELL market-book rows
DGB offered shown as the primary quantity on BUY bids
5TRAT for sale shown as the primary quantity on SELL asks
consistent DGB-per-1-5TRAT rates throughout the trade interface
explicit BUY, SELL TO BUYER and MANAGE YOUR ORDER actions
notes: Ungated direct prototype installer. Wallet, chain, pool, balances and live atomic orders are preserved during update.
